faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Tompkinsville?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Tompkinsville typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of colonies present. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any treatment begins.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are significantly larger than common ants (up to ½ inch long), black or dark brown in color, and leave behind sawdust-like wood shavings called frass near baseboards, windowsills, or wooden structures. You may also hear faint rustling sounds inside walls where they're excavating wood.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in Tompkinsville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Tompkinsville locations. Carpenter ant damage worsens over time, so quick action is essential. Our team is familiar with Staten Island neighborhoods and can typically schedule your inspection and treatment within 24-48 hours of your call.

faqs.question: Will carpenter ants come back after treatment?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment targets both visible ants and hidden colonies, including the queen, to prevent re-infestation. We also provide preventive recommendations and optional follow-up services. Most customers experience complete elimination, and we offer warranty protection for added peace of mind.
